description: Create a multi-file Talon module named 'pii_redactor' in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\pii_redactor\ that provides voice commands to automatically regex-scrub specific types of PII (Emails, Phone Numbers, SSNs) from the current clipboard and paste the sanitized text. The module requires a redact_types.talon-list file declaring the user.redact_types list with mapped entries for 'emails' (email), 'phones' (phone), and 'socials' (ssn). It also requires a pii_redactor.py file (importing re, Module, actions, and clip) defining a Talon action class with redact_text(text: str, pii_type: str)—using regex to replace standard emails, US phone numbers (555-555-5555), and 9-digit SSNs (XXX-XX-XXXX) with placeholders like [EMAIL REDACTED], [PHONE REDACTED], and [SSN REDACTED]—and redact_clipboard(pii_type: str) to update the clipboard and paste. The voice command redact {user.redact_types}: must be defined in pii_redactor.talon to execute the clipboard redaction action.
